instructions.instruction: Use wikilinks ([[Note Name]]) for all internal vault note links, not standard Markdown links
instructions.relevant_when: Creating or editing an Obsidian note that references another note in the same vault

instructions.instruction: Use standard Markdown link syntax ([text](url)) for external URLs, never wikilink syntax
instructions.relevant_when: Adding a hyperlink to an external website in an Obsidian note

instructions.instruction: Place YAML frontmatter at the very start of the file before any other content
instructions.relevant_when: Creating an Obsidian note with properties such as title, tags, or aliases

instructions.instruction: Place block IDs for list and quote blocks on a separate line after the block, not inline on a list item
instructions.relevant_when: Adding a block ID to a list or quote block so it can be referenced from another note

instructions.instruction: Use ![[Note#Heading]] to embed a specific section rather than ![[Note]] to embed the entire note
instructions.relevant_when: Embedding content from another note when only a portion of that note is relevant

instructions.instruction: Use only recognised callout types: note, tip, warning, info, example, quote, bug, danger, success, failure, question, abstract, todo
instructions.relevant_when: Adding a callout block to an Obsidian note

instructions.instruction: Tags cannot contain spaces; use hyphens or underscores to separate words in a tag
instructions.relevant_when: Adding inline tags or frontmatter tags to an Obsidian note

instructions.instruction: Use ==text== syntax to highlight text in Obsidian
instructions.relevant_when: Highlighting important text within note content

instructions.instruction: Use > [!type]- to create a callout that is collapsed by default, and > [!type]+ for one that is expanded
instructions.relevant_when: Creating a foldable callout block in an Obsidian note
